about.title: Frontend Developer
about.subtitle: IT student at SSOŠ Hranice (Czech Republic)
about.description1: Focusing on system administration and infrastructure while building my path toward frontend development.
about.description2: Working with Linux, nginx and Raspberry Pi in my homelab. Learning React, modern JavaScript patterns and CI/CD basics.
about.card_pi_text: Into Raspberry Pi for about a year — got 2 units running Docker containers, Nextcloud, Portainer and code-server. Gained real practice with Linux and networking.
about.card_dev_text: Learning programming for about 2 years. Started with HTML/CSS, moved to JavaScript, Node.js and React.
